Description: KERDI200200/15M is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. This 6 ft. 7 in. wide roll covers the wall from the floor to a standard shower head height. This creates fewer seams and a quicker installation time. The membrane is 8 mil thick and features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/20M covers 215 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. This membrane features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/5M covers 54 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. This membrane features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

Kerdi is a sheet-applied polyethylene waterproofing membrane and vapor retarder. Kerdi200/10M covers 108 sq. ft. and is ideal for waterproofing tiled tub surrounds and showers. This membrane features an anchoring fleece on both sides to anchor it in thin-set mortar. Kerdi eliminates water damage which can lead to mold and mildew.

Kerdi-Band is a waterproofing strip for sealing butt joints and floor/wall connections with Kerdi and Ditra membranes. It is installed with unmodified thinset to ensure a fully water-tight seal to prevent leaks. The 4 mil thickness of the Kerdi-Band helps prevent build up under the tile.

Kerdi-Board-SN 12 in. x 12 in. Shower Niche is a prefabricated shower niche made of Schluter-Kerdi-Board. Lightweight for ease of installing. Waterproof for your shower installation.

Kerdi-Board is a multifunctional tile substrate and building panel that can be used for creating bonded waterproofing assemblies with tile coverings. Kerdi-Board is made from an extruded polystyrene foam panel, with a special reinforcement material on both sides and fleece webbing for effective anchoring in thinset mortar. It can be used in the creation of a broad range of building elements, such as showers and bathtub surrounds.

Kerdi-Board-SC is a lightweight, prefabricated shower curb. It is made of Kerdi-Board and is designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower System. This curb is waterproof and only the joints and corners need to be sealed to complete waterproofing.

Kerdi-Board-SC is a lightweight, prefabricated shower curb. It is made of Kerdi-Board and is designed to integrate with the Schluter-Shower System. This curb is waterproof and only the joints and corners need to be sealed to complete waterproofing.

The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square drain grate comes with a frame, height adjustment collar and lateral adjustment ring. The grate accommodates tiles 1/4 in. to 1-1/4 in. thick and allows for lateral and tilt adjustment. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.

The Kerdi-Drain flange is designed for use with the Kerdi-Shower-T/-TS/-TT shower trays and mortar bed shower applications. The package contains a bonding flange, Kerdi-Kereck waterproof corners, Kerdi-Seal mixing valve seal and Kerdi-Seal pipe seal. The Kerdi-Drain flange can be used in both commercial and residential applications. This flange is to be used with Kerdi-Drain grates which are sold separate.

The Kerdi-Drain grate is designed for use with the Kerdi-Drain flange which is sold separate. The 4 in. square tileable drain support comes with a spacer and lateral adjustment ring. The Kerdi-Drain grate can be used in both commercial and residential applications.
